sections.sectionTitle: Assiria in Egypt leh Ethiopia Zo Ding

verses.text: Assiria kumpipa Sargon in a sawl galkapmang lianpenpa, Filistia khuapi Ashdod-ah pai-in, tua khua va sim hi

Tua hun ma kum thum laitakin Topa in Amoz' tapa Isaiah tung tawnin thu genin, “Na puanhampi suah in la, na khe panin na khedapte suah in,” a ci hi. Amah zong tua mah bangin gamta-in, tangguak leh kheguak tawh lam a pai hi
Ashdod khua a kilak khit ciangin Topa in, “Egypt leh Ethiopia langkhatah lim leh siahil dingin ka nasempa Isaiah tangguak leh kheguak tawh kum thum sung lam a pai mah bangin
Assiria kumpipa in, Egypt gam mite' maizumna ahi, a moi a hamin, tangguak kheguakin, tawbo dawksa-in, Egypt mite galin manin, Ethiopia mite salin manin paikhiatpih ding hi
Tua ciangin amau' lametna Ethiopia leh amau' kisialhpih Egypt' hangin amaute lungkia-in a cihna ding uh theilo ding uh hi

Tua ni ciangin hih tuipi gei-a teng mite in, ‘En un, eite' lametna, Assiria kumpipa' kiang panin eite hong honkhia dingin i belh mite' tungah hih bang piang khinta hi. Eite bangci suahtak ding ihi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
